ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, LEBLANC, BERTRAND (071617), ARB-5 MAILED

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, EDDY FAN-IAT HUANG, BILLY J.Z. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYASHI, JAMES TERRY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- ARBITRATOR FINDS 50 PERCENT NEGLIGENCE ON EACH PARTY AND AWARD IS ADJUSTED ACCORDINGLY. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
